description: Colombian left-wing guerrilla organization founded in 1967, based on Marxism-Leninism. Most of its members demobilized in 1991, but a dissident faction remains active in the Catatumbo region and the Colombia-Venezuela border. It is classified as an Organized Armed Group by the Colombian government.

country_links.evidence_quote: con destino a Centroamérica y México
country_links.context: The EPL exported cocaine to Mexico via Venezuela, with contacts with the Sinaloa Cartel.

country_links.evidence_quote: Los gobiernos de Colombia y Estados Unidos ofrecían una recompensa de 5 millones de dólares por su captura o muerte.
country_links.context: The EPL had contacts with the Sinaloa Cartel to export cocaine, and the U.S. government offered a reward for its leader.

country_links.evidence_quote: utilizando el corredor de Venezuela (ayudado posiblemente por el Cartel de los Soles ) con destino a Centroamérica y México
country_links.context: The EPL used Venezuela as a corridor to export cocaine to Central America and Mexico.
